'''âr-y-dh''' ('''karayadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:calumnate|calumnate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-y-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:calumnate|calumnate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-y-dh
|-
! Lemma
| karayadh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirayadh|thirayadh]] || [[word:jirayadh|jirayadh]] || [[word:shirayadh|shirayadh]] || [[word:kirayadh|kirayadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurayadh|thuthurayadh]] || [[word:jujurayadh|jujurayadh]] || [[word:shushurayadh|shushurayadh]] || [[word:kukurayadh|kukurayadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurayadh|thurayadh]] || [[word:jurayadh|jurayadh]] || [[word:shurayadh|shurayadh]] || [[word:kurayadh|kurayadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurayadh|thurayadh]] || [[word:jurayadh|jurayadh]] || [[word:shurayadh|shurayadh]] || [[word:kurayadh|kurayadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therayadh|therayadh]] || [[word:jerayadh|jerayadh]] || [[word:sherayadh|sherayadh]] || [[word:kerayadh|kerayadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorayadh|thothorayadh]] || [[word:jojorayadh|jojorayadh]] || [[word:shoshorayadh|shoshorayadh]] || [[word:kokorayadh|kokorayadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorayadh|thorayadh]] || [[word:jorayadh|jorayadh]] || [[word:shorayadh|shorayadh]] || [[word:korayadh|korayadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorayadh|thorayadh]] || [[word:jorayadh|jorayadh]] || [[word:shorayadh|shorayadh]] || [[word:korayadh|korayadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠrayadh|thĂŠrayadh]] || [[word:jĂŠrayadh|jĂŠrayadh]] || [[word:shĂŠrayadh|shĂŠrayadh]] || [[word:kĂŠrayadh|kĂŠrayadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharayadh|thatharayadh]] || [[word:jajarayadh|jajarayadh]] || [[word:shasharayadh|shasharayadh]] || [[word:kakarayadh|kakarayadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharayadh|tharayadh]] || [[word:jarayadh|jarayadh]] || [[word:sharayadh|sharayadh]] || [[word:karayadh|karayadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharayadh|tharayadh]] || [[word:jarayadh|jarayadh]] || [[word:sharayadh|sharayadh]] || [[word:karayadh|karayadh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:sharayadh|sharayadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosharayadh|gosharayadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisharayadh|gokisharayadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:sharayadhnĂŒ|sharayadhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosharayadhnknĂŒ|gosharayadhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisharayadhnĂŒ|gokisharayadhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sharayadhshĂ«|sharayadhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosharayadhnkshĂ«|gosharayadhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisharayadhshĂ«|gokisharayadhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharayadhro|sharayadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharayadhnkro|gosharayadhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharayadhro|gokisharayadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sharayadhmu|sharayadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharayadhnkmu|gosharayadhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharayadhmu|gokisharayadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sharayadhsher|sharayadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosharayadhnksher|gosharayadhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisharayadhsher|gokisharayadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:sharayadhng|sharayadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosharayadhnkng|gosharayadhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisharayadhng|gokisharayadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:sharayadhya|sharayadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosharayadhnkya|gosharayadhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisharayadhya|gokisharayadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sharayadhyam|sharayadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosharayadhnkyam|gosharayadhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisharayadhyam|gokisharayadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharayadhnĂŒshĂ«|sharayadhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharayadhnknĂŒshĂ«|gosharayadhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharayadhnĂŒshĂ«|gokisharayadhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharayadhnĂŒro|sharayadhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharayadhnknĂŒro|gosharayadhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharayadhnĂŒro|gokisharayadhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharayadhnĂŒmu|sharayadhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharayadhnknĂŒmu|gosharayadhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharayadhnĂŒmu|gokisharayadhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharayadhshĂ«nĂŒ|sharayadhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharayadhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|gosharayadhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharayadhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokisharayadhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharayadhshĂ«ro|sharayadhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharayadhnkshĂ«ro|gosharayadhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharayadhshĂ«ro|gokisharayadhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharayadhshĂ«mu|sharayadhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharayadhnkshĂ«mu|gosharayadhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharayadhshĂ«mu|gokisharayadhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharayadhronĂŒ|sharayadhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharayadhnkronĂŒ|gosharayadhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharayadhronĂŒ|gokisharayadhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharayadhroshĂ«|sharayadhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharayadhnkroshĂ«|gosharayadhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharayadhroshĂ«|gokisharayadhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharayadhromu|sharayadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharayadhnkromu|gosharayadhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharayadhromu|gokisharayadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharayadhmunĂŒ|sharayadhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharayadhnkmunĂŒ|gosharayadhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharayadhmunĂŒ|gokisharayadhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharayadhmushĂ«|sharayadhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharayadhnkmushĂ«|gosharayadhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharayadhmushĂ«|gokisharayadhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharayadhmuro|sharayadhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharayadhnkmuro|gosharayadhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharayadhmuro|gokisharayadhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
